install_cmd: git clone https://github.com/hiddenillusion/NoMoreXOR && cd NoMoreXOR && pip install -r requirements.txt

name: Balbuzard

name: CyberChef
install_cmd: Local: `git clone https://github.com/gchq/CyberChef && cd CyberChef && npm install && npm run build`; Docker: `docker run -p 8000:8000 ghcr.io/gchq/cyberchef`; or use web at `https://gchq.github.io/CyberChef/
usage: Open in browser; or use Node API for automation

name: Hyperlapse
usage: Embed as JS library for Street View hyperlapse animations

name: RevEye
usage: Browser extension; multi-engine reverse image search from right-click menu

name: ImageNet

name: Mini Instagram
usage: Lightweight Instagram media viewer and downloader

name: Imgrab

name: FOCA
usage: Document metadata extraction from target domains; finds usernames, paths, software fingerprints

name: GeoSetter
usage: Bulk geotag viewing/editing for photo collections

name: JPEGsnoop
usage: JPEG forensic analysis — compression signatures, tamper detection

name: xeuledoc
usage: xeuledoc <google-doc-url>` — extract owner metadata from public Google Docs/Sheets/Slides

name: MediaInfo
install_cmd: apt install mediainfo` or `brew install mediainfo
usage: mediainfo video.mp4` — codec, bitrate, duration, stream metadata

name: Apache Tika
install_cmd: apt install default-jre` && download `tika-app.jar` from https://tika.apache.org/
usage: java -jar tika-app.jar -m document.pdf` — extract metadata from any file format

name: oletools
usage: olevba document.docm` — extract macros; `oleid document.doc` — triage indicators

name: Nmap
